Package org.apache.juneau.commons.utils

Class ObjectUtils

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ObjectUtils
public class ObjectUtils extends Object
Canonical home for object-level helpers: null/empty checks, equality, comparison, coalescing, boolean folds, identity/stringify, small numeric helpers, and optionals.

Terse aliases for these methods live in Shorts.

  • Constructor Summary

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description

    ObjectUtils()
    Constructor — this class is meant to be subclassed.

    Returns the first non-null value, or null.

    Returns the value if non-null, else the default (coalesce).

    static <T> T
    requireNonNull(T value)
    Asserts non-null and returns the value.
    static int
    size(Object o)
    Null-safe size (0 for null; length/size for String/Collection/Map/array; else 1).
    static String
    stringify(Object val)
    Null-safe toString (returns null for null).
    static boolean
    toBoolean(Object val)
    Coerces an object to a boolean (false if null).
    static Object
    unwrap(Object o)
    Unwraps a Supplier/Holder/Optional to its inner value.

    • lessThan

      public static <T extends Comparable<T>> boolean lessThan(T o1, T o2)
      Returns true if o1 is less than o2.
      Type Parameters:
      T - The comparable type.
      Parameters:
      o1 - Object 1.
      o2 - Object 2.
      Returns:
      true if o1 is less than o2.
